# dataframe_to_starrocks

## Purpose

Bulk-ingest a Pandas DataFrame into StarRocks via Stream Load (HTTP PUT). Mirror of dataframe_to_doris.

<!-- FIELDS:START - auto-generated by tools/regen_readme_fields.py -->

## Fields

### Required

| Field | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `asset_name` | `str` | Output Dagster asset name. |
| `upstream_asset_key` | `str` | Upstream asset providing the DataFrame. |
| `table` | `str` | Destination StarRocks table name. |
| `database` | `str` | Destination StarRocks database. |

### Connection

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `host_env_var` | `str` | `"STARROCKS_FE_HOST"` | Env var with StarRocks FE host. |
| `username_env_var` | `str` | `"STARROCKS_USER"` | Env var with StarRocks username. |
| `password_env_var` | `str` | `"STARROCKS_PASSWORD"` | Env var with StarRocks password. |

### Catalog metadata

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `group_name` | `str` | `"starrocks"` | Dagster asset group name. |
| `description` | `str` | — | Asset description. |
| `owners` | `List[str]` | — | Asset owners. |
| `tags` | `Dict[str, str]` | — | Catalog tags. |
| `kinds` | `List[str]` | — | Asset kinds (auto-includes 'starrocks'). |

### Source / target

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `format` | `str` | `"csv"` | 'csv' or 'json'. |

### Other

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `http_port` | `int` | `8030` | StarRocks FE HTTP port. |
| `ssl` | `bool` | `false` | Use https for the Stream Load endpoint. |
| `column_separator` | `str` | `","` | CSV column separator. |
| `line_delimiter` | `str` | `"\n"` | CSV line delimiter. |
| `columns` | `List[str]` | — | Optional explicit column list (defaults to DataFrame column order). |
| `request_timeout_seconds` | `int` | `300` | — |

<!-- FIELDS:END -->

## Example YAML

```yaml
type: dagster_community_components.DataframeToStarRocksComponent
attributes:
  asset_name: starrocks_orders_load
  upstream_asset_key: orders_clean
  table: orders
  database: analytics
  host_env_var: STARROCKS_FE_HOST
  http_port: 8030
  username_env_var: STARROCKS_USER
  password_env_var: STARROCKS_PASSWORD
  group_name: starrocks
```
